flaws.description: The agent's final output fails to meet Phase Gate Completion Criteria. Instead of implementing state machine logic and writing TransitionLog entries as required, the output indicates a tool configuration failure ('No output parser registered'), meaning required artifacts and fields are missing.
flaws.evidence: No output parser registered for backing tool: DBOS Versioned Workflow Engine
